description_long: This object is a rectangular cake with a light blue and white color scheme, featuring a peaked roof-like top and a protruding straw on one side. The front face is labeled with the word 'Milk' in bold, playful lettering, suggesting a milk-themed cake. One side displays a printed image of a blue fruit, possibly a blueberry, framed in a decorative box. The cake sits on a flat, square, gray platform that serves as its display surface. The surface of the cake appears smooth and slightly glossy, with clean, sharp edges and a uniform finish. The overall design is minimalist, with the straw and printed image adding whimsical, themed details.
description: A rectangular, milk-themed cake with a peaked top, blue and white colors, a straw, and a printed fruit image, displayed on a flat gray platform.
description_view_0: Front view shows the plain face of the cake with a peaked top and a straw barely visible behind.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the straw protruding from the roof and the peaked top, with no visible text or image.
description_view_2: Back view displays the word 'Milk' in bold letters and a small circular detail on the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view features a framed image of a blue fruit and the straw extending from the roof.
